title: Two Indonesian UN peacekeepers killed in explosion in Lebanon
summary_full: It is the second fatal incident in the last 24 hours, Unifil says, after Israel expanded its operation against Hezbollah.
summary_public: It is the second fatal incident in the last 24 hours, Unifil says, after Israel expanded its operation against Hezbollah.
